onboarding.title: Welcome to Learning Platform
onboarding.step1Desc: First, please sign in with your Google account
onboarding.step2Desc: AI is analyzing your capability gaps and lighting up your personalized constellation...

careerDirections.frontendDesc: Build an ultimate user experience and visual artistry
careerDirections.fullstackDesc: Wear multiple hats and realize complete product vision

targetLevels.juniorDesc: Master core syntax, deliver standard modules
targetLevels.midDesc: Understand engineering systems, possess architecture decomposition skills
targetLevels.seniorDesc: Drive technology innovation, lead complex system evolution

learningPathFlow.title: Learning Path
learningPathFlow.notSetUpDesc: Once you select a target level, the system will generate a personalized roadmap and take you to the constellation canvas.
learningPathFlow.projectBonus: Completing this project will significantly boost proficiency on this node and earn you substantial XP

taskCenter.title: Task Center
taskCenter.selectNode: Please select a strategic node from the "Learning Path" on the left
taskCenter.autoGenerate: The system will automatically generate targeted tasks
taskCenter.tricky: Feeling stuck? Try breaking it down into micro-tasks
taskCenter.breakdown: AI will generate quick-to-execute atomic steps based on the current node.
taskCenter.feynmanPrompt: Please summarize the core logic of this node
taskCenter.feynmanDesc: Summarize the principles, boundaries, and practical applications in your own words...
taskCenter.summarizeFirst: Please summarize the core logic first before submitting validation.
taskCenter.feynmanPassed: Feynman validation passed, learning outcome recorded.
taskCenter.noFurtherDecompose: This task is already at executable granularity, no further decomposition needed.
taskCenter.accepted: Task accepted! Start completing the task steps
taskCenter.completeAllSteps: Please complete all task steps first!
taskCenter.congratulations: Congratulations on completing the task! Earned

skillTree.unlocked: Skill not unlocked! Complete prerequisite skills first.

constellationSkillTree.fundamentalsDesc: The starting point for all skills

customProject.title: Practice Project Recommendations
customProject.selectNodeForSuggestions: Please select a node from the roadmap to get personalized project suggestions
customProject.performanceDesc: Implement a high-performance virtual list table component supporting million-row rendering (using react-window + TanStack Table)
customProject.componentDesc: Build a configurable Modal component library from scratch, featuring animation, drag-and-drop, focus management and more
customProject.microDesc: Build a multi-application Micro Frontend Dashboard system based on Module Federation
customProject.gitDesc: Build a Git workflow visualization tool supporting multi-person collaboration
customProject.concurrencyDesc: Design and implement a high-concurrency flash sale system frontend (with countdown, anti-fraud, real-time updates)
customProject.painPoint: " core pain points, design a comprehensive practice project
customProject.projectBonus: Completing this project will significantly boost proficiency on this node and earn you substantial XP
customProject.projectStarted: Project started! Begin your practical journey now

equipment.title: Equipment Library
equipment.description: Completed projects transform into powerful equipment, boosting your skill attributes
equipment.emptyDesc: You'll receive equipment rewards after completing projects

dataDashboard.title: Level-Driven Learning System
dataDashboard.subtitle: Roadmap as navigation hub • Click nodes to drive tasks and practice projects in real-time

explorePage.explorationDesc: Based on your skill level and career direction, we recommend the most suitable learning path for you
explorePage.skillGapDesc: You have room for improvement in backend development. We recommend strengthening Node.js and database skills
explorePage.advantageDesc: Your frontend skills have reached an intermediate-to-advanced level. Consider learning more advanced architecture design
explorePage.recommendationsDesc: Based on your learning pace, you can reach the full-stack engineer level in about 6 months
explorePage.deepTypeScriptDesc: Your JavaScript foundation is solid. TypeScript will improve code quality and development efficiency
explorePage.nextJSDesc: Based on your React skills, Next.js is a natural progression
explorePage.graphQLDesc: Compared to REST APIs, GraphQL takes your backend skills to the next level
explorePage.systemDesignDesc: You have multiple skills under your belt. It's time to learn holistic system architecture

goalSetting.title: Choose Career Direction
goalSetting.goalExample: Example: Become an excellent React developer
goalSetting.motivationDesc: Why do you want to learn this direction? This will help AI tailor a better learning plan for you...

careers.frontendDesc: Focus on user interfaces and interactive experiences
careers.fullstackDesc: Master both frontend and backend development
careers.backendDesc: Responsible for server logic and database design
careers.mobileDesc: Develop iOS and Android mobile applications
careers.aiSkills: Python, TensorFlow, Deep Learning, Data Analysis
careers.dataDesc: Extract insights and value from data
careers.dataSkills: Statistics, Python/R, Data Visualization, Machine Learning

projects.portfolioDesc: Build a professional portfolio website showcasing your skills and projects with responsive design, animations, and dark mode

portfolioSteps.design: Design website structure and UI layout
portfolioSteps.homepage: Create responsive navbar and homepage design
portfolioSteps.projects: Implement project cards and detail pages
portfolioSteps.animation: Add smooth transitions and animations with CSS/JS

projects.restfulAPIDesc: Build a complete RESTful API with Node.js and Express, featuring authentication, data validation, and error handling

restfulAPISteps.setup: Initialize project and design MongoDB data model
restfulAPISteps.auth: Implement registration, login, and JWT validation
restfulAPISteps.test: Write API documentation and unit tests

projects.ecommerceDesc: Develop a cross-platform e-commerce app with React Native, featuring product lists, shopping cart, and payment flow

ecommerceSteps.init: Set up React Native project and navigation structure
ecommerceSteps.products: Implement product display and search functionality
ecommerceSteps.payment: Integrate payment API and order management

projects.chatbotDesc: Build a machine learning-based chatbot using natural language processing to understand user intent

chatbotSteps.train: Train intent recognition and entity extraction models
chatbotSteps.conversation: Implement context management and dialogue flow

projects.ciccdDesc: Configure a complete CI/CD pipeline with automated testing, building, and cloud deployment

ciccdSteps.docker: Write Dockerfile and build container images
ciccdSteps.jenkins: Set up automated testing and build processes
ciccdSteps.k8s: Create K8s configs and deploy to cluster
ciccdSteps.monitor: Configure monitoring alerts and log collection

projects.uiDesignDesc: Design and implement a complete UI component library with design specifications, components, and documentation

uiDesignSteps.components: Design components in Figma (buttons, inputs, etc.)
